title: Huawei K562e-10 Edge ONT & Wi-Fi Repeater, 3x GLAN, Wi-Fi 6
description: The Huawei OptiXstar K562e-10 is a wireless router that is perfect for use in combination with ONT units in bridge mode or as a Wi-Fi repeater with an existing Huawei wireless router. Supporting the WiFi 6 standard, the router achieves a maximum modulation rate of up to 3000Mbps (2402 Mbps in the 5GHz band and 574 Mbps in the 2.4GHz band). The wireless section supports Beamforming, MU-MIMO, Band Steering, and more, all backed by modern WPA3 encryption. The router features 4x Gigabit Ethernet… The Ethernet ports are located on the back, with the reset and WPS buttons on the sides The Huawei OptiXstar K562e-10 uses built-in artificial intelligence (eAI) to enhance online experiences for various added-value services such as gaming, education, and teleconferencing. The router can automatically optimize network parameters such as channel, power, and band, depending on current traffic demands. It can also detect and eliminate interference from other Wi-Fi sources, ensuring a stable and smooth connection. Additionally, the router supports the Quality of Service (QoS)… Device 12V / 1A power adapter
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Security WPA3 AES 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Fixed Fixed antennas 2 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 7 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (3) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN Gigabit LAN Yes Power Max. power consumption [W] 12 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1A Physical characteristics Buttons Reset, WPS/WiFi Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 240 Width [mm] 155 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 105
